category_sources: source_facts.description calls it a distributed, scalable, durable orchestration engine; official cadenceworkflow.io docs describe workflows and activities for distributed applications.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub organization/repository and documentation use Cadence/Cadence Workflow branding; source_facts.name is cadence-workflow.
docs_sources: Official Cadence documentation is hosted at cadenceworkflow.io/docs with get-started and concepts pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/uber/cadence; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official cadenceworkflow.io concepts docs describe workflows, activities, and distributed application orchestration.
